summary: PILLAR: Go Mobile | STATUS: PARTIAL PASS | Date: 2026-03-27 | Mobile audit at 375px for dipali@clubconcierge.in (Mojo). 6/8 phases PASS, 2 phases PARTIAL (Phase 1: allergy tags + pet switcher; Phase 3: tab bar wrapping). Phases 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8 all PASS.

test_context.pet: Mojo (Indie, chicken+beef allergy, 8 pets total on account)

items.check: Dark teal gradient (very dark top, lighter bottom)
Allergy tags showing (⚠️ No chicken, ⚠️ No beef)
items.detail: No ⚠️ formatted allergy tags anywhere in hero or visible area. Allergies only mentioned in Mira bar text: 'I've already removed everything containing chicken and beef from Mojo's travel picks.' No visual warning tags.

items.check: Pet switcher scrolls horizontally (not wrapping to 2 rows)
items.detail: Pet switcher uses flexWrap:'wrap' not overflowX:'auto'. With 8 pets (Mojo, Mystique, Bruno, Buddy, Lola, Meister, Luna, Coco), it wraps to 3 rows (height=144px). Code line 149: style={{ display:'flex', gap:6, flexWrap:'wrap', justifyContent:'flex-end' }}
Scrollable strip with ✨Soul Go, 🪄Mira's Picks, 🛡️Safety, 😌Calming, 🎒Carriers, 🥣Feeding, 💊Health & Docs, 🏡Stay & Board, ✦Soul Made™
overflowX:auto confirmed
go-tab-go (✈️ Go Essentials), go-tab-nearme (📍 Near Me), go-tab-services (🗺️ Book a Service)

items.check: Tab labels match spec (✈️ Products, 🗺️ Book a Service, 📍 Near Me)
items.detail: Labels differ slightly but acceptable: ✈️ Go Essentials, 📍 Near Me, 🗺️ Book a Service

Tab bar wraps to 2 rows: row1=[✈️ Go Essentials y=33, 📍 Near Me y=33], row2=[🗺️ Book a Service y=103]. Container height=147px. Labels too long for 375px with padding:'10px 24px'. Fix: shorten labels OR use overflowX:'auto' + white-space:'nowrap' OR reduce padding.
Safety & Security, Calming & Comfort, Carriers & Crates, Feeding & Hydration, Health & Documents, Stay & Board
Fixed overlay with border-radius 20px 20px 0 0
Header shows 'chicken-free · beef-free · Personalised for Mojo'
🎯 All Products and ✦ Personalised tabs present and clickable
All, Safety, Travel-Safety pills found
★ Mira Pick badge visible in GuidedGoPaths
✦ TRAVEL CONCIERGE® · 'Want us to plan Mojo's whole trip?' with 'Talk to your Concierge®' button
✦ SOUL MADE™ · TRAVEL GEAR FOR MOJO with 'Explore Soul Made →' button
All 8: Flight Coordination, Road & Train Travel, Boarding & Daycare, Pet Sitting, Relocation, Pet Taxi, Travel Planning, Emergency Travel
GoServiceBookingModal opens (5-step flow for flight)
8 service cards loaded from API (TRAVEL category)
Auto-loaded Goa results (10 pet-friendly stays) since Mojo's city=Goa
Placeholder: 'Goa, Paris, Bali, New York — anywhere…'
Goa, Coorg, Manali, Bali, Paris, London + more visible
Pet Hotels, Boarding, Pet Taxi, Travel Vet, Day Care, Dog Parks in repeat(3,1fr) grid
Input: 'Search city or area…' with Find button
Dark card: '✦ MIRA ON MOJO'S TRAVEL - When booking a pet-friendly hotel for Mojo...'
MiraPlanModal opens: 'Mojo's Adventure Plan · Travel and outings curated for you both'
SOUL MADE™ · GO modal opens with Indie-specific items (Indie Bandana, Indie Tote Bag, etc.)
GoConciergeModal opens: 'What should Mojo's trip feel like? Three questions.'
NearMeConciergeModal opens with header 'BOOK VIA CONCIERGE · GO', venue='Pet-Friendly Stay in Goa', date picker, notes, 'Send to Go Concierge →' button. Confirmed NOT a grooming modal.
Widget at bottom-right (z-[9999] fixed), opens as full panel

items.check: Mira shows travel context quick actions
items.detail: Quick Actions: 'Indie-specific go tips', 'Show me options', 'What's recommended for Mojo?'

items.check: Ask 'where can I take Mojo?' → travel context response
items.detail: Response includes 'Day Adventures: Dog parks, Pet-friendly hiking trails (short ones since Mojo's still little!), Dog-friendly cafes' and 'Travel Tips' - travel-relevant content confirmed

ui_bugs.issue: Pet switcher uses flexWrap:'wrap' causing it to wrap into 3 rows for users with 8 pets (Mojo, Mystique, Bruno, Buddy, Lola, Meister, Luna, Coco). Spec requires horizontal scrolling, not wrapping.
ui_bugs.fix: Change flexWrap:'wrap' to flexWrap:'nowrap' and add overflowX:'auto' on the pet switcher container

ui_bugs.issue: No ⚠️ No chicken / ⚠️ No beef allergy warning tags shown in the hero section. Allergies only referenced in Mira intelligence bar text below. Other pages (CareSoulPage) show allergy tags in the hero.
ui_bugs.fix: Add allergy tags to hero section, similar to how they appear in CareSoulPage or in the DimExpanded sheet header

ui_bugs.issue: Tab bar wraps to 2 rows at 375px. Row1: [✈️ Go Essentials, 📍 Near Me], Row2: [🗺️ Book a Service]. Container height=147px instead of ~44px.
ui_bugs.location: GoMobilePage.jsx lines 170-189 — tab container has flexWrap:'wrap'
ui_bugs.fix: Option 1: Add overflowX:'auto' + white-space:'nowrap' to tab container. Option 2: Shorten labels (e.g., '✈️ Products', '📍 Near Me', '🗺️ Services'). Option 3: Remove flexWrap:'wrap' and adjust flex layout.

issues: Pet switcher wraps to 3 rows instead of scrolling horizontally — visible for accounts with 4+ pets
No ⚠️ allergy warning tags in hero — the allergies are only in the Mira intelligence bar further down the page
Tab bar wraps to 2 rows — 'Book a Service' tab falls to second row at 375px

action_items: Fix pet switcher: GoMobilePage.jsx line 149 — change flexWrap:'wrap' to flexWrap:'nowrap' + overflowX:'auto' on the switcher container
Add allergy tags to hero section: GoMobilePage.jsx — add ⚠️ No chicken / ⚠️ No beef badges below the title/subtitle in the hero div (dark gradient area)
Fix tab bar: GoMobilePage.jsx lines 170-189 — shorten tab labels OR add overflow-x:auto to prevent wrapping at 375px. Suggested labels: '✈️ Products', '📍 Near Me', '🗺️ Services'
critical_code_review_comments: GoMobilePage.jsx line 149: flexWrap:'wrap' on pet switcher causes overflow for users with many pets. Should be overflowX:'auto' + flexWrap:'nowrap'
GoMobilePage.jsx lines 170-189: Tab bar container has flexWrap:'wrap' causing 2-row layout on 375px. Tab labels are too long. Either shorten or use scrollable row.

GoMobilePage.jsx: Hero section missing allergy tags — other pillar pages (Care, Dine) show ⚠️ allergy tags in visible pill format near hero title. Go page only mentions allergies in the Mira bar text further down.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (3 item failures out of ~23 checked items; 6/8 phases fully pass)

phases_summary.phase1_hero: ❌ PARTIAL — Allergy tags missing, pet switcher wraps
phases_summary.phase3_tab_bar: ❌ PARTIAL — 3 tabs present but wraps to 2 rows at 375px
phases_summary.phase4_products_tab: ✅ PASS — All 6 dims, bottom sheet, toggles, pills, Mira pick, Concierge cards
phases_summary.phase5_services_tab: ✅ PASS — 8 service tiles, booking modal, live API services
phases_summary.phase6_find_stay_tab: ✅ PASS — Stays, search, chips, divider, 6 type tiles, Mira tip
phases_summary.phase7_concierge_wiring: ✅ PASS — All 4 concierge flows verified, NearMeConciergeModal correct
phases_summary.phase8_mira: ✅ PASS — Widget opens, travel context quick actions, travel response

context_for_next_testing_agent: Go mobile page at 375px. Tested with dipali@clubconcierge.in (Mojo - Indie, chicken+beef allergy, 8 pets). 3 issues: (1) pet switcher wraps 3 rows instead of horizontal scroll, (2) no ⚠️ allergy tags in hero, (3) tab bar wraps to 2 rows. All Phase 4-8 features confirmed working: dimensions, bottom sheet, services, stays, concierge modals, Mira. Credential note: token not in localStorage but user data is - auth works via session/cookie. Test credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123
